translations.- Default run for Android App & Apple (i:
- Default run for Android App & Apple (iOS/macOS App): `ZReviewTender -r`

- Only run Android App: `ZReviewTender -g`

- Run Apple (iOS/macOS App) only: `ZReviewTender -a`
translations.- Fetch the review list of App Store iOS:
- Fetch the review list of App Store iOS/macOS apps and Google Play Android apps, then filter out the latest reviews that have not been crawled yet.

- [Default Feature] Forwards the latest crawled reviews to Slack. Clicking the message Timestamp link quickly directs you to the backend to reply to the review.

- [Default Feature] Supports using Google Translate API to automatically translate reviews not in the specified language or region into your language

- [Default Feature] Supports automatic recording of reviews to Google Sheet

- Supports flexible expansion. Besides the default features, you can develop and integrate additional functions according to your team’s workflow.  
  e.g. Forward reviews to Discord, Line, Telegram…

- Use timestamps to record crawl positions and prevent duplicate review fetching

- Supports filtering features, allowing you to specify to crawl only reviews with certain ratings, containing specific keywords, or from particular regions/languages.

- Apple provides a stable and reliable source of App Store app review data based on the [**brand new App Store Connect API**](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/list_all_customer_reviews_for_an_app){:target="_blank"}, unlike [previously using unreliable XML data or Fastlane Spaceship Sessions that expire and require manual maintenance](../f1365e51902c/)

- Android also uses the official AndroidpublisherV3 API to fetch review data

- Supports deployment using Github Repo with Github Action, allowing you to quickly and freely set up the ZReviewTender App Reviews bot.

- 100% Ruby @ [RubyGem](https://rubygems.org/gems/ZReviewTender){:target="_blank"}
translations.- No server space needed ✅\n\n- No envir:
- No server space needed ✅

- No environment requirements needed ✅

- No need to understand engineering principles ✅

- Complete the Config file setup to finish the deployment ✅

- Deploy in 8 Easy Steps ✅

- Completely Free ✅  
  Github Action offers over 2,000 minutes of runtime per account per month. Running ZReviewTender to fetch reviews takes only about 15~30 seconds each time.  
  By default, it runs every 6 hours, 4 times a day, **using only about 60 minutes of quota per month**.  
  Github Private Repos can be created for free without limits.
translations.- Public URL API (RSS) ⚠️: No flexible f:
- Public URL API (RSS) ⚠️: No flexible filtering, limited information, quantity limits, and occasional data corruption issues make it unstable; it may be deprecated by the official source in the future.

- Using [**Fastlane**](https://fastlane.tools/){:target="_blank"} **— [SpaceShip](https://github.com/fastlane/fastlane/tree/master/spaceship){:target="_blank"}**, we encapsulate complex web operations and session management to fetch review data from the App Store Connect backend (essentially acting as a web emulator crawler to scrape data from the backend).

- Access: **Private**

translations.- The API does not provide a method to r:
- The API does not provide a method to retrieve the entire list of reviews; it can only fetch reviews added or edited within the last 7 days.

- Using JWT to connect to Google API (without relying on related libraries e.g. google-apis-androidpublisher_v3)

- Here is an example of generating and using a Google API JWT:
translations.- To use the automatic translation featu:
- To use the automatic translation feature, please ensure that the `Cloud Translation API` is enabled in GCP and the Service Account being used has the necessary permissions.

- To use the logging to Google Sheet feature, please ensure that the GCP has enabled the `Google Sheets API` and `Google Drive API`, and the Service Account used has been added as well.
translations.- [List All Customer Reviews for an App]: - [List All Customer Reviews for an App](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/list_all_customer_reviews_for_an_app){:target="_blank"} This endpoint does not provide app version information
translations.- appStoreConnectP8PrivateKeyID: `Key ID:
- appStoreConnectP8PrivateKeyID: `Key ID`

- appStoreConnectP8PrivateKeyFilePath: `/AuthKey_XXXXXXXXXX.p8`, download the API Key and place the file in the same directory as the config yml.
translations.- class: `FilterProcessor` requires no a:
- class: `FilterProcessor` requires no adjustment, points to lib/Processors/`FilterProcessor`.rb

- enable: `true` / `false` Enable this Processor or not

- keywordsInclude: [“ `keyword1` ”,“ `keyword2` ”…] Filter reviews containing these keywords

- ratingsInclude: [ `1` , `2` …] Filter reviews that include these rating scores from 1 to 5

- territoriesInclude: [“ `zh-hant` ”,” `TWN` ”…] Filter reviews that include these regions (Apple) or languages (Android)
translations.- class: `GoogleSheetProcessor` requires:
- class: `GoogleSheetProcessor` requires no changes, points to lib/Processors/ `SlackProcessor`.rb

- enable: `true` / `false` Enable this Processor or not

- googleSheetAPIKeyFilePath: `/gcp_key.json`  
  GCP Service Account credential key file path `*.json`. Place the file in the same directory as the config yml. Refer to the above Google Play Console JSON key example for file content.  
  (Please ensure the service account in the JSON key has access to `Google Sheets API` and `Google Drive API`)

- googleSheetTimeZoneOffset: `+08:00` Review time display timezone

- googleSheetID: `Google Sheet ID`  
  Can be obtained from the Google Sheet URL: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/ `googleSheetID` /

- googleSheetName: Sheet name, e.g. `Sheet1`

- keywordsInclude: [“ `keyword1` ”,“ `keyword2` ”…] Filter reviews containing these keywords

- ratingsInclude: [ `1` , `2` …] Filter reviews that include these rating scores from 1 to 5

- territoriesInclude: [“ `zh-hant` ”,” `TWN` ”…] Filter reviews that include these regions (Apple) or languages (Android)

- values: [] Combination of review information fields
translations.- class: `GoogleTranslateProcessor` requ:
- class: `GoogleTranslateProcessor` requires no changes, points to lib/Processors/`GoogleTranslateProcessor`.rb

- enable: `true` / `false` Enable or disable this Processor

- googleTranslateAPIKeyFilePath: `/gcp_key.json` The file path for the GCP Service Account credential key `*.json`. Place the file in the same directory as the config yml. For a sample content, refer to the Google Play Console JSON key example above.  
  (Please ensure the service account in the JSON key has `Cloud Translation API` access permission)

- googleTranslateTargetLang: `zh-TW`, `en` … target translation languages

- googleTranslateTerritoriesExclude: [“ `zh-hant` ”,” `TWN` ”…] Regions (Apple) or languages (Android) excluded from translation
translations.- class: `SlackProcessor` requires no ad:
- class: `SlackProcessor` requires no adjustment, points to lib/Processors/ `SlackProcessor`.rb

- enable: `true` / `false` Enable this Processor or not

- slackTimeZoneOffset: `+08:00` Timezone for displaying review time

- slackAttachmentGroupByNumber: `1` sets how many reviews are combined into one message for faster sending; default is 1 review per Slack message

- slackBotToken: `xoxb-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx` [Slack Bot Token](https://slack.com/help/articles/115005265703-Create-a-bot-for-your-workspace){:target="_blank"}. Slack recommends creating a Slack Bot with the `postMessages` scope and using it to send Slack messages

- slackBotTargetChannel: `CXXXXXX` group ID (**not the group name**), the Slack Bot will send messages to this channel; **you need to add your Slack Bot to this channel**

- slackInCommingWebHookURL: `https://hooks.slack.com/services/XXXXX`  
  Using the old [Incoming WebHook URL](https://slack.com/apps/A0F7XDUAZ-incoming-webhooks){:target="_blank"} to send messages to Slack. Note! Slack no longer recommends this method for sending messages.
translations.- config Object: Corresponds to the sett:
- config Object: Corresponds to the settings in the config yml file

- configFilePath: Path to the config yml file used

- baseExecutePath: The path where the user runs ZReviewTender
translations.- keyFilePath: `/gcp_key.json` Path to t: - keyFilePath: `/gcp_key.json` Path to the key file, place the file in the same directory as the config yml.
translations.- slackBotToken and slackInCommingWebHoo: - slackBotToken and slackInCommingWebHookURL, SlackProcessor will prefer to use slackBotToken

2. Use [rbenv](https://github.com/rbenv/rbenv){:target="_blank"} or [rvm](https://rvm.io/){:target="_blank"} to install Ruby 2.6.5 and switch to the Ruby version managed by rbenv/rvm.

3. Use `which ruby` to confirm that the current Ruby in use is **not** the system Ruby at `/usr/bin/ruby`.

4. After setting up the Ruby environment, install `ZReviewTender` using the following command:

translations.```\n%TITLE% 評價標題\n%BODY% 評價內容\n%RATING%:
```
%TITLE% Review Title
%BODY% Review Content
%RATING% Rating Score 1~5
%PLATFORM% Review Source Platform Apple or Android
%ID% Review ID
%USERNAME% Reviewer
%URL% Review Link
%TERRITORY% Review Region (Apple) or Review Language (Android)
%APPVERSION% Reviewed App Version
%CREATEDDATE% Review Creation Date
```
translations.```ruby\n$lib = File.expand_path('../lib:
```ruby
$lib = File.expand_path('../lib', File.dirname(__FILE__))

require "Models/Review"
require "Models/Processor"
require "Helper"
require "ZLogger"

# Add to config.yml:
#
# processors:
#   - ProcessorTemplate:
#       class: "ProcessorTemplate"
#       parameter1: "value"
#       parameter2: "value"
#       parameter3: "value"
#       ...
#

class ProcessorTemplate < Processor

    def initialize(config, configFilePath, baseExecutePath)
        # initialize Processor
        # get parameter from config e.g. config["parameter1"]
        # configFilePath: file path of config file (apple.yml/android.yml)
        # baseExecutePath: user execute path
    end

    def processReviews(reviews, platform)
        if reviews.length < 1
            return reviews
        end

        ## do what you want to do with reviews...
        
        ## return result reviews
        return reviews
    end
end
```
translations.```ruby\nrequire \"jwt\"\nrequire \"time:
```ruby
require "jwt"
require "time"

payload = {
  iss: "client_email field in the GCP API service account key (*.json) file",
  sub: "client_email field in the GCP API service account key (*.json) file",
  scope: ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/androidpublisher"].join(' '),
  aud: "token_uri field in the GCP API service account key (*.json) file",
  iat: Time.now.to_i,
  exp: Time.now.to_i + 60*20
}

rsa_private = OpenSSL::PKey::RSA.new("private_key field in the GCP API service account key (*.json) file")
token = JWT.encode payload, rsa_private, 'RS256', header_fields = {kid:"private_key_id field in the GCP API service account key (*.json) file", typ:"JWT"}

uri = URI("token_uri field in the GCP API service account key (*.json) file")
https = Net::HTTP.new(uri.host, uri.port)
https.use_ssl = true
request = Net::HTTP::Post.new(uri)
request.body = "grant_type=urn%3Aietf%3Aparams%3Aoauth%3Agrant-type%3Ajwt-bearer&assertion=#{token}"

response = https.request(request).read_body

bearer = result["access_token"]

### use bearer token

uri = URI("https://androidpublisher.googleapis.com/androidpublisher/v3/applications/APP_PACKAGE_NAME/reviews")
https = Net::HTTP.new(uri.host, uri.port)
https.use_ssl = true
        
request = Net::HTTP::Get.new(uri)
request['Authorization'] = "Bearer #{bearer}";
        
response = https.request(request).read_body
        
result = JSON.parse(response)

# success!
```
translations.```yaml\nname: ZReviewTender\non:\n wor:
```yaml
name: ZReviewTender
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  schedule:
    - cron: "15 */6 * * *" # Runs every six hours, you can refer to the above crontab to modify the schedule

jobs:
  ZReviewTender:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: ZReviewTender Automatic Bot
      uses: ZhgChgLi/ZReviewTender@main
      with:
        command: '-r' # Execute Apple & iOS App review check, you can change this command as shown above
```

packageName: '' # Android App Package Name

playConsoleDeveloperAccountID: '' # Google Console Developer Account ID
playConsoleAppID: '' # Google Console App ID
......
```
translations.```yaml\nplatform: 'apple'\nappStoreConn:
```yaml
platform: 'apple'
appStoreConnectP8PrivateKeyFilePath: '' # APPLE STORE CONNECT API PRIVATE .p8 KEY File Path
appStoreConnectP8PrivateKeyID: '' # APPLE STORE CONNECT API PRIVATE KEY ID
appStoreConnectIssueID: '' # APPLE STORE CONNECT ISSUE ID
appID: '' # APP ID
...
```
translations.```yaml\nprocessors:\n - FilterProces:
```yaml
processors:
    - FilterProcessor:
        class: "FilterProcessor"
        enable: true # enable
        keywordsInclude: [] # keywords you want to filter out
        ratingsInclude: [] # ratings you want to filter out
        territoriesInclude: [] # territories you want to filter out
    - GoogleTranslateProcessor: # Google Translate Processor, will translate review text to your language, you can remove whole block if you don't need it.
        class: "GoogleTranslateProcessor"
        enable: false # enable
        googleTranslateAPIKeyFilePath: '' # Google Translate API Credential .json File Path
        googleTranslateTargetLang: 'zh-TW' # Translate to what language
        googleTranslateTerritoriesExclude: ["TWN","CHN"] # Review origin territory (language) that you don't want to translate.
    - SlackProcessor: # Slack Processor, resend App Review to Slack.
        class: "SlackProcessor"
        enable: true # enable
        slackTimeZoneOffset: "+08:00" # Review Created Date TimeZone
        slackAttachmentGroupByNumber: "1" # 1~100, how many review messages in 1 slack message.
        slackBotToken: "" # Slack Bot Token, send slack message through Slack Bot.
        slackBotTargetChannel: "" # Slack Bot Token, send slack message through Slack Bot. (recommended, first priority)
        slackInCommingWebHookURL: "" # Slack Incoming WebHook URL, send slack message through Incoming WebHook, not recommended, deprecated.
    ...More Processors...
```
translations.appID: [App Store Connect](https://appst: appID: [App Store Connect](https://appstoreconnect.apple.com/apps){:target="_blank"} -> App Store -> General -> App Information -> `Apple ID`

translations.googleSheetAPIKeyFilePath: `/gcp_key.jso:
googleSheetAPIKeyFilePath: `/gcp_key.json`  
GCP Service Account credential key file path `*.json`. Place the file in the same directory as the config yml. Refer to the above Google Play Console JSON key example for file content.

translations.⚠️ 使用 Gem 可直接下 `ZReviewTender` ，若為手動部署專案: ⚠️ When using the Gem, you can run `ZReviewTender` directly. For manual project deployment, use `bundle exec ruby bin/ZReviewTender` to execute.
translations.⚠️⚠️ 請務必建立 **Private Repo** ⚠️⚠️\n\n: ⚠️⚠️ Please make sure to create a **Private Repo** ⚠️⚠️
translations.❌❌❌執行發生錯誤同時 Github 也會寄信通知，不怕發生錯誤機器人掛掉但沒人: ❌❌❌If an error occurs during execution, Github will also send an email notification, so you don't have to worry about the bot crashing without anyone noticing!
translations.上傳完成後回到 `/config` 目錄查看檔案是否正確儲存&上傳。\n\n: After uploading, go back to the `/config` directory to check if the files are correctly saved and uploaded.
translations.上傳相應的 Key 檔案到 `config/` 目錄下:\n\n: Upload the corresponding key files to the `config/` directory:
After receiving the news that Apple [updated the App Store Connect API](../f1365e51902c/) this year, I immediately started redesigning the new review bot. Besides switching to the official API, I also optimized the previous architecture and became more familiar with Ruby usage.
translations.使用 [rbenv](https://github.com/rbenv/rben: Use [rbenv](https://github.com/rbenv/rbenv){:target="_blank"} or [rvm](https://rvm.io/){:target="_blank"} to install Ruby 2.6.5 and switch to the Ruby version managed by rbenv/rvm.
translations.使用 `which ruby` 確認當前使用的 Ruby **非** `/usr: Use `which ruby` to confirm that the current Ruby in use is **not** the system Ruby at `/usr/bin/ruby`
translations.使用教學結束，再來是幕後開發祕辛分享。\n\n: The tutorial ends here. Next is a behind-the-scenes development story.
translations.使用時間戳紀錄爬取位置，防止重複爬取評價\n: Use timestamps to record crawl positions and prevent duplicate review fetching
translations.例如我的 Google Sheet 欄位如下：\n\n: For example, my Google Sheet columns are as follows:
translations.依照去年做法就只能使用方法二來達成，但效果不太完美；Session 會過期，需要: According to last year's approach, only method two could be used to achieve this, but the results were not ideal; the session would expire, requiring manual periodic updates, and it couldn't be placed on a CI/CD server because the session would expire immediately if the IP changed.
translations.依照指定條件過濾撈取的評價，只處理符合條件的評價。\n\n: Filter and fetch reviews based on specified criteria, processing only those that meet the conditions.
translations.則 values 可設定成：\n\n: Then values can be set to:
translations.區塊查看 Badge，如果 passing 即代表 init 成功。\n\n: Check the badge in the block; if it shows passing, it means the init was successful.
translations.去年總結出來的 Apple iOS/macOS App 撈取評價的解決方案：\n: The solution for fetching Apple iOS/macOS App reviews summarized last year:
translations.參考前文「6. 初始化 ZReviewTender (手動觸發執行一次)」\n\: Refer to the previous section "6. Initialize ZReviewTender (manually trigger execution once)"
translations.參考本文下方「 **設定** 」區塊完成配置好 `android.yml` &: Refer to the "**Settings**" section below to complete the configuration of `android.yml` & `apple.yml`.
translations.取得 App Store iOS/macOS App 與 Google Play: Fetch the review list of App Store iOS/macOS apps and Google Play Android apps, then filter out the latest reviews that have not been crawled yet.
translations.另外要注意因為 Android API 只提供查詢近 7 天新增或編修的評價，所: Also, note that since the Android API only provides queries for reviews added or edited in the last 7 days, the scheduling cycle should not exceed 7 days to avoid missing any reviews.
translations.另外還會產生一個 `execute.log` 紀錄執行錯誤。\n\n: An `execute.log` file will also be generated to record execution errors.
translations.可先依照 [**官方步驟建立 GCP & Service Account**](: First, follow the [**official steps to create GCP & Service Account**](https://cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/production#create_service_account){:target="_blank"} to download and save the GCP Service Account key (`*.json`).
translations.可參考 [crontab.guru](https://crontab.guru/: You can refer to [crontab.guru](https://crontab.guru/#15_*/6_*_*_*){:target="_blank"} to configure according to your needs.
translations.可在 Repo 首頁 Readme 中的\n\n: Can be placed in the Repo homepage Readme under the section
translations.可在 Repo 首頁 Readme 中的頂部查看最新一次執行狀況：\n\n: You can check the latest run status at the top of the Readme on the Repo homepage:
translations.可由 [Google Play Console](https://play.go: Can be obtained from the [Google Play Console](https://play.google.com/console/){:target="_blank"} -> Dashboard -> App page URL:
translations.同樣使用 JWT 串接 Google API (不依賴相關類別庫 e.g. go: Using JWT to connect to Google API (without relying on related libraries e.g. google-apis-androidpublisher_v3)
translations.商城的評價對產品很重要但他卻是一個非常人工跟重複轉介溝通的事。\n\n: Store reviews are very important for products, but managing them is a very manual and repetitive referral communication task.
translations.回頭調整好 android/apple config yml 後再回到 6. 步: After adjusting the android/apple config yml, go back to step 6 and trigger the execution again from the beginning.
translations.因為要時不時人工上去看一下新評價，如過有客服問題再將問題轉發給客服協助處理，很重: Because someone needs to manually check new reviews from time to time, and if there are customer service issues, forward them to the support team for assistance, it becomes repetitive and manual.
translations.在 `config/` 目錄下，右上角選擇「Add file」-&gt;「Upl: In the `config/` directory, click "Add file" in the top right corner -> "Upload files"
translations.執行完成狀態會變 3「✅ Init ZReviewTender」-> Proje: The execution status will change to 3 "✅ Init ZReviewTender" -> Project init successful.
translations.執行頻率越高會消耗越多Github Action 執行額度\n: Higher execution frequency will consume more GitHub Action minutes.
translations.如果不熟悉 Ruby or Gems 可以 Follow 以下步驟 Step b: If you're not familiar with Ruby or Gems, you can follow the steps below to install `ZReviewTender` step by step.
translations.如果您只需要 ZReviewTender 自帶的預設功能 (to Slack/G: If you only need the default features of ZReviewTender (to Slack/Google Translate/Filter), you can use the following quick deployment method.
translations.如果有發生意外的錯誤，請 [**建立一個 Issue**](https://gi: If an unexpected error occurs, please [**create an Issue**](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZReviewTender/issues){:target="_blank"} **and include the log information. We will fix it as soon as possible!**
translations.如果熟悉 Gems 可以直接使用以下指令安裝 `ZReviewTender`\n: If you are familiar with Gems, you can install `ZReviewTender` directly using the following command:
translations.如要使用自動翻譯功能請確認 GCP有啟用 `Cloud Translation: To use the automatic translation feature, please ensure that the `Cloud Translation API` is enabled in GCP and the Service Account being used has the necessary permissions.
translations.如要使用記錄到 Google Sheet 功能請確認 GCP 有啟用 `Goog: To use the logging to Google Sheet feature, please ensure that the GCP has enabled the `Google Sheets API` and `Google Drive API`, and the Service Account used has been added as well.
translations.完全免費 ✅\nGithub Action 提供每個帳號 2,000+分鐘/月:
Completely Free ✅  
Github Action offers over 2,000 minutes of runtime per account per month. Running ZReviewTender to fetch reviews takes only about 15~30 seconds each time.  
By default, it runs every 6 hours, 4 times a day, **using only about 60 minutes of quota per month**.  
Github Private Repos can be created for free without limits.
translations.完成 Config 檔案配置即完成部署 ✅\n: Complete the Config file setup to finish the deployment ✅
translations.實時監測 App 的最新評價內容並即時給予反饋，提升協作效率及消費者滿意度\n\: Real-time monitoring of the latest app reviews with instant feedback to improve collaboration efficiency and customer satisfaction
translations.將 config yml 裡配置的相應 Key、外部檔案路徑一併上傳到 `con: Upload the corresponding keys and external file paths configured in the config yml to the `config/` directory. Drag the files to the "upper block" -> wait for the upload to complete -> then directly click "Commit changes" below to save.
translations.將用於組合評價訊息連結，讓團隊可以點擊連結快速進入後台評價回覆頁面。\n\n: Used to compose review message links, allowing the team to quickly access the backend review reply page by clicking the link.
translations.將評價翻譯成指定語言。\n\n: Translate reviews into the specified language.
translations.展開「 `Run ZreviewTender -r` 」區塊可查看執行 Log。: Expand the "`Run ZreviewTender -r`" block to view the execution log.
translations.很詭異，只能 workaround 先打這個 endpoint 篩出最新評價，再: It's strange, but the only workaround is to first call this endpoint to filter the latest reviews, then call [List All App Store Versions for an App](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/list_all_app_store_versions_for_an_app){:target="_blank"} & [List All Customer Reviews for an App Store Version](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/list_all_customer_reviews_for_an_app_store_version){:target="_blank"} to combine the app version information.
translations.從 apple.example.yml & android.example.ym: Generate apple.yml & android.yml from apple.example.yml & android.example.yml into the `config/` directory in the current execution path.
translations.您可參考 [lib/Processors/ProcessorTemplate.r: You can refer to [lib/Processors/ProcessorTemplate.rb](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZReviewTender/blob/main/lib/Processors/ProcessorTemplate.rb){:target="_blank"} to create your extensions:
translations.您還可以依照自己需求配置 Github Action 執行規則。\n\n: You can also configure the Github Action execution rules according to your own needs.
translations.或是點擊上方 Tab「Actions」-> 等待「Init ZReviewTen: Or click the top tab "Actions" -> Wait for the "Init ZReviewTender" workflow to complete:
translations.支援使用 Github Repo w/ Github Action 部署，讓您免: Supports deployment using Github Repo with Github Action, allowing you to quickly and freely set up the ZReviewTender App Reviews bot.
translations.支援彈性擴充，除包含的預設功能外您仍可依照團隊工作流程，自行開發所需功能並整合進:
Supports flexible expansion. Besides the default features, you can develop and integrate additional functions according to your team’s workflow.  
e.g. Forward reviews to Discord, Line, Telegram…
translations.支援過濾功能，可指定只爬取 多少評分、評價內容包含什麼關鍵字、什麼地區/語系 的: Supports filtering features, allowing you to specify to crawl only reviews with certain ratings, containing specific keywords, or from particular regions/languages.
translations.更多資訊可參考： [2021 Pinkoi Tech Career Talk —: For more information, please refer to: [2021 Pinkoi Tech Career Talk — Secrets of a High-Efficiency Engineering Team](../11f6c8568154/) .
translations.最後點擊下方「Create repository from template」按: Finally, click the "Create repository from template" button below.
translations.最重要的資訊，GCP Service Account 身份權限金鑰 ( `*.j: The most important information, GCP Service Account identity permission key ( `*.json` )
translations.會刪除 `/latestCheckTimestamp` 裡的 Timestamp: It will delete the Timestamp record file in `/latestCheckTimestamp`, returning to the initial state. Running the crawl again will receive the init success message once more:
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本以為去年總結的 [**AppStore APP’s Reviews Slack: I thought last year's summaries, [**AppStore APP’s Reviews Slack Bot Stories**](../cb0c68c33994/) and the related implementation [**ZReviewsBot — Slack App Review Notification Bot**](../33f6aabb744f/), had wrapped up the integration of the latest app reviews into company workflows; unexpectedly, Apple updated the [App Store Connect API](../f1365e51902c/) this year, allowing this process to continue evolving.
translations.查看 「 `ZReviewTender -r` 」區塊的 log 確認執行成功！: Check the log in the 「 `ZReviewTender -r` 」 section to confirm successful execution!
translations.無需了解工程原理 ✅\n: No need to understand engineering principles ✅
translations.爬取完新評價後，會進入這個 function 讓 Processor 有機會處理: After fetching new reviews, this function is called to give the Processor a chance to handle them. Please return the processed Reviews after handling.
translations.確認右上方 Repo 名稱有出現「🔒」和 Private 標籤。\n\n: Make sure the repo name in the top right shows the "🔒" icon and the Private label.
translations.第一次執行成功會發送初始化成功訊息到指定 Slack Channel，並在執行相: On the first successful run, an initialization success message will be sent to the specified Slack channel, and files `latestCheckTimestamp/Apple` and `latestCheckTimestamp/Android` will be created in the corresponding execution directory to record the timestamp of the last fetched reviews.
translations.編輯完成後可以直接在下方「Commit changes」儲存設定。\n\n: After editing, you can directly save the settings by clicking "Commit changes" below.
translations.編輯完成後點擊右上方「Start commit」選擇「Commit change: After editing, click "Start commit" at the top right and select "Commit changes" to save the settings.
translations.若出現 Error 即代表執行發生錯誤，請從 Acions -&gt; ZRev: If an Error occurs, it means the execution failed. Please check the logs under Actions -> ZReviewTender; if there is an unexpected error, please [**create an Issue**](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZReviewTender/issues){:target="_blank"} **and attach the log information. It will be fixed as soon as possible!**
translations.若無則代表您建立的事 **Public Repo 非常危險** ，請前往上方 T: If not, it means your created repository is a **Public Repo and very risky**. Please go to the top Tab "Settings" -> "General" -> bottom "Danger Zone" -> "Change repository visibility" -> "Make private" to **change it back to a Private Repo**.
translations.若需要自訂 Processor 請改用手動部署，因 gem 上的 ZReview: If you need to customize the Processor, please use manual deployment, as the ZReviewTender gem is packaged and cannot be dynamically adjusted.
translations.設定排程定時( [crontab](https://crontab.guru/): Set a scheduled task ( [crontab](https://crontab.guru/){:target="_blank"} ) to continuously fetch new reviews. ZReviewTender will crawl new reviews with timestamps from the last `latestCheckTimestamp` to the current fetch time and update the timestamp record file.
translations.透過 ZReviewTender 評價機器人，將評價自動轉發到 Slack Ch: With the ZReviewTender review bot, reviews are automatically forwarded to the Slack channel, allowing everyone to quickly receive the latest feedback, track, and discuss it in real time. It also helps the entire team understand current user opinions and suggestions about the product.
translations.透過 [**Fastlane**](https://fastlane.tools: Using [**Fastlane**](https://fastlane.tools/){:target="_blank"} **— [SpaceShip](https://github.com/fastlane/fastlane/tree/master/spaceship){:target="_blank"}**, we encapsulate complex web operations and session management to fetch review data from the App Store Connect backend (essentially acting as a web emulator crawler to scrape data from the backend).
translations.這邊可以看到出現 Error，因為我還沒配置好我的 config yml 檔案。: Here you can see an Error because I haven't set up my config yml file yet.
translations.進入 `config/` 目錄完成 `android.yml` & `apple: Go to the `config/` directory to complete the configuration of the `android.yml` & `apple.yml` files.
translations.進入目錄，執行 `bundle install` [**ZReviewTende: Go to the directory and run `bundle install` to install dependencies for [**ZReviewTender**](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZReviewTender){:target="_blank"}.
translations.配置完成！爾後每 6 個小時會自動爬取期間內的最新評價並轉發到你的 Slack: Configuration complete! From now on, the latest reviews within each period will be automatically fetched every 6 hours and forwarded to your Slack Channel!
translations.附上個 Google API JWT 產生&使用範例：\n: Here is an example of generating and using a Google API JWT:
translations.需要按照 [官方文件](https://developers.google.co: Follow the steps in the [official documentation](https://developers.google.com/android-publisher/getting_started){:target="_blank"} to create a Google Cloud Project & Service Account. Then, go to Google Play Console -> Setup -> API Access to enable the `Google Play Android Developer API` and link the project. Finally, download the service account JSON key from GCP.
translations.預設執行 Android App & Apple(iOS/macOS App)：: Default run for Android App & Apple (iOS/macOS App): `ZReviewTender -r`
translations.顯示當前 ZReviewTender 再 [RubyGem](https://r: Display the current latest version number of ZReviewTender on [RubyGem](https://rubygems.org/gems/ZReviewTender){:target="_blank"}.
translations.默認讀取 `/config/` 下 `android.yml` 設定\n: By default, reads the `android.yml` configuration under `/config/`

translations.點擊「ZReviewTender」可進入查看執行狀況。\n\n: Click "ZReviewTender" to check the execution status.
translations.點擊上方 Tab「Actions」-&gt; 左方「ZReviewTender」: Click the top tab "Actions" -> left side "ZReviewTender" -> top right " `ZReviewTender.yml` "
translations.點擊上方 Tab「Actions」-> 左方選擇「ZReviewTender」-: Click the "Actions" tab above -> select "ZReviewTender" on the left -> click the "Run workflow" button on the right -> click the "Run workflow" button to execute ZReviewTender once.
translations.點擊上方 Tab「Code」回到專案目錄，Project init 成功的話會出: Click the "Code" tab above to return to the project directory. If the project initialization is successful, you will see:
translations.點擊右上方「Use this template」按鈕。\n\n: Click the "Use this template" button at the top right.
translations.點擊右上方「✏️」編輯檔案。\n\n: Click the "✏️" at the top right to edit the file.
translations.點擊進入要編輯的 confi YML 檔案點擊右上方「✏️」編輯檔案。\n\n: Click to open the confi YML file you want to edit, then click the "✏️" icon at the top right to edit the file.
